lines.speaker: Elder Reggle
lines.text: Sorry, human, but I'm not particularly interested in making conversation with those that I don't trust.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have anything for sale?

lines.speaker: Elder Reggle
lines.text: I have some farming supplies. Why not take a look?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing out here?

lines.speaker: Elder Reggle
lines.text: This is where I live, human.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not a fan of living in the town?

lines.speaker: Elder Reggle
lines.text: It is too busy there. Besides, I wanted to be closer to a spot that would be suitable for coral propagation.

lines.speaker: Elder Reggle
lines.text: Yes. If you wish to try it yourself, just head down to the seabed.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I might just do that. So, have you always specialised in coral?

lines.speaker: Elder Reggle
lines.text: No. I used to just focus on farming, but I found coral propagation to be similar in many ways, while also being far more interesting.
